question.text: Is the kill-switch alone sufficient to stop user-visible harm?

branch.conclusion: Flip kill-switch immediately; notify on-call channel; open incident; route to postmortem.
Rollback to prior bundle AND flip kill-switch; escalate to engineering lead; open sev-1 incident.

question.text: Is the failure contained to a single feature?

branch.conclusion: Throttle the affected feature; investigate with rollback as backup option.
Rollback to prior bundle; downgrade to sev-2 incident if contained after rollback.
Open ticket; investigate during business hours; no immediate kill-switch or rollback.

example.p: severity=sev-1 (regulated user-visible) → killswitch_sufficient=false (fallback rule needed) → conclusion: rollback-and-escalate.
